title: CRT//IMG — Monochrome Processor
description: Interactive CRT monitor image processor with phosphor palettes, Floyd-Steinberg dithering, scanlines, bloom, and halftone effects. All processing runs locally in the browser.
license_notes: Google Fonts: VT323 (SIL OFL 1.1), Share Tech Mono (SIL OFL 1.1). No other external dependencies.
